title: juncus acutus subsp. tommasinii
intro: Juncus acutus subsp. tommasinii, also known as Tommasini's rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus acutus plant, a type of perennial rush that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Juncus acutus subsp. tommasinii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
